top_categories.workout_context: When someone attacks on rolling urban road course at altitude, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Race-pace efforts that mimic 947 Ride Joburg's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
947 Ride Joburg's rolling urban road course at altitude forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 60 miles.
60 miles on rolling urban road course at altitude burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
66ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At 947 Ride Joburg, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of 947 Ride Joburg. Train it until it feels boring.
Base fitness for 947 Ride Joburg. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on rolling urban road course at altitude. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At 947 Ride Joburg, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 3,937ft of climbing on rolling urban road course at altitude does to your power file on race day.
Varied gradients on rolling urban road course at altitude demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for 947 Ride Joburg’s 60 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at 947 Ride Joburg. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 60 miles of rolling urban road course at altitude in Johannesburg, South Africa.
